entries.name: UNSUPPORTED_SPEC_VERSION
entries.description: The requested AGCP spec version is not supported (typically unsupported MAJOR).

entries.name: TENANT_SCOPE_VIOLATION
entries.description: A request attempted cross-tenant access or referenced a tenant-scoped artifact from another tenant.

entries.name: TENANT_STATE_INVALID
entries.description: The tenant state does not allow the requested operation or the requested transition is invalid.

entries.name: SCHEMA_INVALID
entries.description: The submitted JSON payload failed schema validation.

entries.name: SIGNATURE_INVALID
entries.description: Provenance signature verification failed.

entries.name: IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
entries.description: The same idempotency_key was reused with a different payload.

entries.name: POLICY_RESOLUTION_FAILED
entries.description: Active policy could not be resolved for the tenant and effective window.

entries.name: POLICY_MODULE_INVALID
entries.description: The policy evaluation module failed integrity validation or failed required structural checks.

entries.name: POLICY_MODULE_UNAVAILABLE
entries.description: The referenced policy evaluation module could not be loaded or resolved.

entries.name: POLICY_MODULE_NONDETERMINISTIC
entries.description: The policy evaluation module exhibits nondeterminism or violates PEC determinism constraints.

entries.name: POLICY_EVALUATION_OUTPUT_INVALID
entries.description: The policy evaluation module produced outputs that do not conform to PEC output requirements.

entries.name: UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_TYPE
entries.description: A constraint type was referenced that is not defined in the constraint-type registry.

entries.name: UNKNOWN_INVARIANT_TYPE
entries.description: An invariant type was referenced that is not defined in the invariant-type registry.

entries.name: ACTION_NOT_FOUND
entries.description: The referenced action_id does not exist within the tenant scope.

entries.name: ACTION_NOT_AUTHORIZED
entries.description: Execution commit attempted without a valid authorization state and ledger binding.

entries.name: COSIGN_INVALID
entries.description: Cosign token verification failed (invalid signature, wrong binding, or malformed token).

entries.name: COSIGN_EXPIRED
entries.description: Cosign token is expired.

entries.name: RATE_LIMITED
entries.description: Tenant or global rate limit exceeded.

entries.name: PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE
entries.description: Request payload exceeds maximum configured size.

entries.name: INTERNAL_ERROR
entries.description: An unexpected internal error occurred.
